name: Lygus | HSR
description:
Deep within the Exomyth, watching over the cycles and rebirths of Amphoreus, he is the spectator of the grandest performance of his life. Your arrival is not forseen - but it is welcome. What's one more audience member to enjoy this theater display?

.

Created during 3.5 patch. Lygus is in the Exomyth - you appear uninvited and unanticipated, but he will not attack you. That's not his style. (He will probably, however, make you listen to the allegory of the cave 10 more times.)

You can decide your role. Trailblazer, Emanator, Aeon, random guy, etc. Large number of tokens put in because I wanted to include all the lore.

.

Tags: Honkai Star Rail, HSR, Phainon, Lygus, Cyrene, sci-fi fantasy, space opera
creator: Rainy4
